'''鈭歞-p-z''' ('''dpz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:shoot at|shoot at]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shoot at|shoot at]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| dpz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidapaz|thidapaz]] || [[word:jidapaz|jidapaz]] || [[word:shidapaz|shidapaz]] || [[word:kidapaz|kidapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudapaz|thuthudapaz]] || [[word:jujudapaz|jujudapaz]] || [[word:shushudapaz|shushudapaz]] || [[word:kukudapaz|kukudapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudapaz|thudapaz]] || [[word:judapaz|judapaz]] || [[word:shudapaz|shudapaz]] || [[word:kudapaz|kudapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudapaz|thudapaz]] || [[word:judapaz|judapaz]] || [[word:shudapaz|shudapaz]] || [[word:kudapaz|kudapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedapaz|thedapaz]] || [[word:jedapaz|jedapaz]] || [[word:shedapaz|shedapaz]] || [[word:kedapaz|kedapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodapaz|thothodapaz]] || [[word:jojodapaz|jojodapaz]] || [[word:shoshodapaz|shoshodapaz]] || [[word:kokodapaz|kokodapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodapaz|thodapaz]] || [[word:jodapaz|jodapaz]] || [[word:shodapaz|shodapaz]] || [[word:kodapaz|kodapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodapaz|thodapaz]] || [[word:jodapaz|jodapaz]] || [[word:shodapaz|shodapaz]] || [[word:kodapaz|kodapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dapaz|th忙dapaz]] || [[word:j忙dapaz|j忙dapaz]] || [[word:sh忙dapaz|sh忙dapaz]] || [[word:k忙dapaz|k忙dapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadapaz|thathadapaz]] || [[word:jajadapaz|jajadapaz]] || [[word:shashadapaz|shashadapaz]] || [[word:kakadapaz|kakadapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadapaz|thadapaz]] || [[word:jadapaz|jadapaz]] || [[word:shadapaz|shadapaz]] || [[word:kadapaz|kadapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadapaz|thadapaz]] || [[word:jadapaz|jadapaz]] || [[word:shadapaz|shadapaz]] || [[word:kadapaz|kadapaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadapaz|shadapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadapaz|goshadapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadapaz|gokishadapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadapazn眉|shadapazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadapaznkn眉|goshadapaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapazn眉|gokishadapazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadapazsh毛|shadapazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadapaznksh毛|goshadapaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadapazsh毛|gokishadapazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapazro|shadapazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapaznkro|goshadapaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapazro|gokishadapazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapazmu|shadapazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapaznkmu|goshadapaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapazmu|gokishadapazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadapazsher|shadapazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadapaznksher|goshadapaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadapazsher|gokishadapazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadapazng|shadapazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadapaznkng|goshadapaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadapazng|gokishadapazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadapazya|shadapazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadapaznkya|goshadapaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadapazya|gokishadapazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadapazyam|shadapazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadapaznkyam|goshadapaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadapazyam|gokishadapazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapazn眉sh毛|shadapazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapaznkn眉sh毛|goshadapaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapazn眉sh毛|gokishadapazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapazn眉ro|shadapazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapaznkn眉ro|goshadapaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapazn眉ro|gokishadapazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapazn眉mu|shadapazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapaznkn眉mu|goshadapaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapazn眉mu|gokishadapazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapazsh毛n眉|shadapazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapaznksh毛n眉|goshadapaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapazsh毛n眉|gokishadapazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapazsh毛ro|shadapazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapaznksh毛ro|goshadapaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapazsh毛ro|gokishadapazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapazsh毛mu|shadapazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapaznksh毛mu|goshadapaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapazsh毛mu|gokishadapazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapazron眉|shadapazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapaznkron眉|goshadapaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapazron眉|gokishadapazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapazrosh毛|shadapazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapaznkrosh毛|goshadapaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapazrosh毛|gokishadapazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapazromu|shadapazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapaznkromu|goshadapaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapazromu|gokishadapazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapazmun眉|shadapazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapaznkmun眉|goshadapaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapazmun眉|gokishadapazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapazmush毛|shadapazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapaznkmush毛|goshadapaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapazmush毛|gokishadapazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapazmuro|shadapazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapaznkmuro|goshadapaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapazmuro|gokishadapazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
